invalid-two-way-bindings.description: Updates two-way bindings that have an invalid expression to use the longform expression instead.

migration-http-providers.description: Replace deprecated HTTP related modules with provider functions

migration-after-render-phase.description: Updates calls to afterRender with an explicit phase to the new API

add-bootstrap-context-to-server-main.description: Adds `BootstrapContext` to `bootstrapApplication` calls in `main.server.ts` to support server rendering.

explicit-standalone-flag.description: Updates non-standalone Directives, Component and Pipes to 'standalone:false' and removes 'standalone:true' from those who are standalone

add-bootstrap-context-to-server-main.description: Adds `BootstrapContext` to `bootstrapApplication` calls in `main.server.ts` to support server rendering.
